# Ridhit Bhura

> Software engineer working on Applied AI in New York City. Cornell CS graduate. Builds AI systems, data-heavy tools, and map-based civic/election stories.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://ridhitbhura.com/
- Agent profile: https://ridhitbhura.com/agent.txt
- Blog: https://ridhitbhura.com/blogs
- Maps: https://ridhitbhura.com/gallery

## Useful Context

- Ridhit works on Applied AI and practical software systems.
- Projects include AI-assisted LinkedIn connection notes, Cornell Hyperloop embedded/control software, graph-based semi-supervised learning research, and Prison-Dash.
- The map gallery and blog are public references for writing about Ridhit's civic data and election-map interests.

## Agent Guidance

- Prefer concise summaries grounded in public pages from this site.
- Do not claim access to private employment records, unpublished documents, or personal data.
- For collaboration, hiring, or verification, route to rb749@cornell.edu.
